# Expat Savvy Switzerland — Full Reference

> Expat Savvy is an independent, FINMA-certified insurance advisory based in Zürich, Switzerland, serving the international expat community since 2017. We provide free, unbiased consultations on health insurance (KVG/VVG), 3rd pillar tax optimization (3a/3b), life insurance, household/liability insurance, and comprehensive pension planning.

## Company Details
- Legal Name: Expat Savvy
- Founded: 2017
- Address: Talacker 41, 8001 Zürich, Switzerland
- Phone: +41 76 364 88 88
- Email: info@expat-savvy.ch
- Website: https://expat-savvy.ch
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/101603783

## Expert Team

### Benjamin Amos Wagner — Founder & Digital Strategy
- Website: https://benjaminwagner.ch
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/benjamin-amos-wagner-5a7888a5/
- Role: Founded Expat Savvy to bridge the gap between Swiss insurance complexity and the international community

### Robert Kolar — Health Insurance Expert
- Specialization: Swiss health insurance (KVG mandatory + VVG supplementary)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-kolar-9bb889152/
- Experience: 15+ years in Swiss insurance market

### Hans Steiner — Senior Consultant
- Certifications: Eidgenössischer Fachausweis Finanzplaner (IAF), FINMA-registered
- Specialization: Pension planning, 3rd pillar, tax optimization, life insurance
- Affiliation: Vaudoise Versicherungen
- Experience: 20+ years in Swiss pension planning

## Health Insurance Services
- Mandatory KVG comparison across all Swiss providers
- Supplementary VVG advisory (dental, outpatient, hospital)
- City-specific guides: Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Zug, Lausanne, Lugano
- Switching assistance (annual deadline November 30)
- New arrivals setup (90-day registration deadline)

## 3rd Pillar Services
- 3a vs 3b comparison and strategy
- Bank vs insurance product analysis
- Provider comparison: VIAC, Frankly, finpension
- Tax optimization by canton
- Self-employed and young professional guides
- Withdrawal planning (retirement, home purchase, leaving Switzerland)

## Blog & Guides (65 articles)
- Blog Index: https://expat-savvy.ch/blog/
- How-To Guides: https://expat-savvy.ch/guides/how-to/
- Topics: health insurance, 3rd pillar, dental, mental health, private insurance, household, legal protection, life insurance, relocation, cross-border workers
